nasb.text: His disciples remembered that it was written, “Zeal for Your house will consume me.”

esv.text: His disciples remembered that it was written, “Zeal for your house will consume me.”

cnv.text: 他的門徒就想起經上記著：“我為你的殿心中迫切，如同火燒。”

ccb.text: 祂的门徒想起圣经上说：“我对你的殿充满炙热的爱。”

csbs.text: 他的门徒们就想起经上记着：“我为你的殿，心火焚烧。”
